'''Darak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ferroan]] who lived on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. Of high-rank in Ferroan society, she was the partner of [[Rowel]]; the two of whom were initially suspicious of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], until [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Sekot]] itself trusted them.

{{Char-stub}}
